title: Snowfall
description: A mod that makes it so snow layers fall when the block below them is broken, just as they do in Bedrock edition!
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8a093a0a7ea870e706cfa1b86c3e92039039d37.png)

A mod that makes it so snow layers fall when the block below them is broken, just as they do in Bedrock edition!
